page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Quake is a package to correct substitution sequencing errors in experiments with deep coverage (e.g. >15X), specifically intended for Illumina sequencing reads
page_metadata.biotools__summary: A program for detecting and correcting errors in next generation sequencing reads.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A program for detecting and correcting errors in next generation sequencing reads.
